Directions.en: Right click this item then left click an armour to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件护甲以使用。

Description.zh: 提升护甲的[Quality|品质]

XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件护甲上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click an equipable non-unique item to apply it. Mirrored copies cannot be modified.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件可装备且非传奇的物品来使用，使用后将产生一件复制品。 请注意，复制出来的物品无法再使用通货改变其属性。

Description.zh: [Mirrored|复制]一件指定物品

XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件可装备的非传奇物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。镜像物品无法被修改。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click an item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件物品来使用。

Description.en:
Allows an item to foresee the result of the next Currency item used on it
Modifying the item in any way removes the ability to foresee
Description.zh:
允许物品预示对其使用的下一个通货物品的结果
任何对物品的修改会移除该预示能力

Description.en: Change the type of quality of a skill gem with quality to another random quality
Description.zh: 将技能石的品质类型改变成另一种随机品质

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a gem to apply it. The maximum quality is 20%.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一块宝石上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。最大品质为 20%。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a support gem to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击辅助宝石来应用。

Description.en: Change the type of quality of a support gem with quality to another random quality
Description.zh: 将辅助宝石的品质类型改变成另一种随机品质

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a gem to apply it. The maximum quality is 20%.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一块宝石上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。最大品质为 20%。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click on the item you wish to modify.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击你要调整的物品。

Description.en: Adds or replaces an enchantment on a weapon. This may reforge the weapon's sockets.
Description.zh: 给武器添加一种附魔，或替换一种现有附魔。这会重铸武器插槽

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on the item you wish to modify.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在你希望修改的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>>。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click on the item you wish to modify.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击你要调整的物品。

Description.en: Adds or replaces an enchantment on a body armour. This may reforge the body armour's sockets.
Description.zh: 给身体护甲添加一种附魔，或替换一种现有附魔。这会重铸武器插槽

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on the item you wish to modify.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在你希望修改的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>>。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a shaped map on the atlas to downgrade it. You can then earn the Shaper's Orb again to reshape another map afterwards.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，在左键点击异界图鉴上被使用过塑界之玉的地图。 之后可以获得塑界之玉重新提升其他地图。

Description.en: Downgrades a map on the Atlas
Description.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个地图降阶.

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a shaped map on the atlas to downgrade it. You can then earn the Shaper's Orb again to reshape another map afterwards.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在异界图鉴中使用过塑界之玉的地图上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使其降级。你随后可以获得塑界之玉以重塑其他地图。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Magic item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件魔法物品以使用。

Description.en: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding a guaranteed modifier
Description.zh: 将一件[ItemRarity|魔法]物品升级为[ItemRarity|稀有]物品，必定增加一项词缀

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Magic item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件魔法物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Magic item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件魔法物品以使用。

Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一张地图以使用。

Description.en: Reforges a map item as another of the same tier
Description.zh: 将地图重铸为相同等阶的其他地图

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a map to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一张地图上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a map to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一张地图以使用。

Description.en: Reforges a map item as another of a higher tier
Description.zh: 将地图重铸为高一阶的其他地图

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a map to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一张地图上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Strongbox to apply it. Has greater effect on lower rarity Strongboxes. The maximum quality is 20%.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击保险箱来使用。 对低稀有度的保险箱效果更佳。 最大品质为 20%。

Description.en: Improves the quality of a Strongbox
Description.zh: 增加保险箱的品质(越高级的宝箱 增加的品质越少 至多20%）

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Strongbox to apply it. Has greater effect on lower rarity Strongboxes. The maximum quality is 20%.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一个保险箱上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。对低稀有度保险箱效果更佳。最大品质为20%。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Strongbox to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击保险箱来使用。

Description.en: Greatly improves the quality and rewards of a Strongbox and strengthens its defenders
Description.zh: 大幅强化保险箱的品质，增强它的守护者

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Strongbox to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一个保险箱上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a unique item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击传奇物品使用。

Description.en: Reforges a unique equipment as another of the same item class
Description.zh: 将传奇装备重铸为同一部位的其他传奇物品

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a unique item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件传奇物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it. Cannot be used on Fractured items.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击一件稀有物品以使用。不能对分裂的物品使用。

Description.en: [Fracture|Fracture] a random modifier on a rare item with at least 4 modifiers, locking it in place.
Description.zh: [Fracture|分裂]一件具有至少 4 个词缀的稀有物品的一个随机词缀，使其锁定。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a rare item to apply it. Cannot be used on Influenced, Synthesised or Fractured items.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件稀有物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。不能用于具有影响效果的物品、虚空忆境物品或分裂的物品。

Directions.en: Can be used in a personal Map Device, allowing you to capture the Soul of the Map's Boss. The Vessel containing the captured Soul can be retrieved from the Map Device. You must be in the Map when the boss is defeated.
Directions.zh: 可以在私人地图装置中开启异界之门。你可以在其中获得地图首领的灵魂。禁锢了首领灵魂的禁灵之瓶最后将出现在地图装置上。当首领被击败时你必须处于地图中。

Description.en:
Unique Boss deals 10% increased Damage
Unique Boss has 10% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Unique Boss has 10% increased Life
Unique Boss has 20% increased Area of Effect
Description.zh:
传奇首领伤害增加 10%
传奇首领攻击速度和施法速度提升 10%
传奇首领生命值提升 10%
传奇首领范围伤害效果提高 20%

XBoxDirections.en: Can be used in a personal Map Device, allowing you to capture the Soul of the Map's Boss. The Vessel containing the captured Soul can be retrieved from the Map Device. You must be in the Map when the boss is defeated.
XBoxDirections.zh: 可以在私人地图装置中开启异界之门。你可以在其中获得地图首领的灵魂。禁锢了首领灵魂的禁灵之瓶最后将出现在地图装置上。当首领被击败时你必须处于地图中。

Directions.en: Required to reveal Breach Strongholds on the Atlas.
Directions.zh: 用于在异界图鉴上揭示裂隙要塞。

Item drops after killing {0} monsters
Description.zh:
用一件可装备物品来孕育一件塑界者物品或裂界者护甲
击败 {0} 个怪物后掉落

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on an item to apply it. The Incubated item drops after killing a specific number of monsters.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。孕育的物品会在击败特定数量的怪物后掉落。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click an item to apply it. The Incubated item drops after killing a specific number of monsters.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击一个物品来添加。孕育的物品在击败特定数量的怪物后掉落。

Description.en:
Effective against Beasts of levels 1 to 13.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

更适合捕获 1 至 13 级的魔物。
可以设置后通过该猎魔夹捕获魔物。

Directions.en:
Can be used at The Withered Willow to Instil Amulets with a Notable Passive Skill.
Right click this item then left click a Rare Jewel to apply it.
Directions.zh:
可在萎败细柳处使用，以向项链注入一个核心天赋。
右键点击该物品，然后左键点击一件稀有珠宝以应用。

Description.en:
Removes a random modifer and Augments a [Rarity|Rare] [BasicJewel|Basic Jewel] with a
new guaranteed [Crafted] modifier
Description.zh: 移除一条随机词缀，并为一件[Rarity|稀有][BasicJewel|基本珠宝]添加一条新的必定出现的[Crafted|工艺]词缀。

XBoxDirections.en:
Can be used at The Withered Willow to Instil Amulets with a Notable Passive Skill.
<<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Rare Jewel to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh:
可在萎败细柳处使用，以向项链注入一个核心天赋。
按下<<xbox_button_x>>使用，随后在一件稀有珠宝上按<<xbox_button_a>>以应用。

右键点击该物品，然后左键点击一件稀有珠宝以应用。

Description.en:
Removes a random modifer and Augments a [Rarity|Rare] [BasicJewel|Basic Jewel] with a
new guaranteed [Crafted] modifier
Description.zh: 移除一条随机词缀，并为一件[Rarity|稀有][BasicJewel|基本珠宝]添加一条新的必定出现的[Crafted|工艺]词缀。

XBoxDirections.en:
Can be used at The Withered Willow to Instil Amulets with a Notable Passive Skill.
<<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Rare Jewel to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh:
可在萎败细柳处使用，以向项链注入一个核心天赋。
按下<<xbox_button_x>>使用，随后在一件稀有珠宝上按<<xbox_button_a>>以应用。

Description.en:
Destroys an item, applying its influence to another of the same item class
The second item is reforged as a rare item with both influence types and new modifiers
Description.zh:
摧毁一件物品，将它的影响效果添加给另一件同类物品
后者会重铸为一件稀有物品，并兼有两者的影响效果和新词缀。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on the item you wish to take the influence from, then <<xbox_button_a>> on an item of the same item class you wish to apply it to.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，在影响效果来源物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>>，随后在需要添加影响效果的同类物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以添加。

Directions.en: Right click on this item while in a Town or Hideout to use it.
Directions.zh: 在城镇和藏身处中，右键点击该物品。

Description.en:
Creates a portal to the Rogue Harbour from a Town or Hideout
Used as Currency for services in the Rogue Harbour
Description.zh:
在城镇或藏身处产生一个前往黄金港的传送门
可以在黄金港当作通货物品使用。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用。

Directions.en: Combine 100 Splinters to create a Ritual Vessel.
Directions.zh: 用 100 个裂片创造一个驱灵法器。

XBoxDirections.en: Combine 100 Splinters to create a Ritual Vessel.
XBoxDirections.zh: 用 100 个裂片创造一个驱灵法器。

Directions.en: Right-click this item then left-click a Ritual Altar to store the monsters from the completed Ritual in this item. Cannot be used on a Ritual in a map opened with a Blood-Filled Vessel.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击驱灵祭坛，从完成的驱灵仪式中将怪物储藏进该物品。不能用于地图中被浸血法器开启的驱灵仪式。

Description.en: Stores the monsters slain for the first time from a completed Ritual Altar for future use
Description.zh: 从完成的驱灵祭坛中将首次击败的怪物储存起来供日后使用。

XBoxDirections.en: Use this item on a Ritual Altar to store the monsters from the completed Ritual in the item. Cannot be used on a Ritual in a map opened with a Blood-Filled Vessel.
XBoxDirections.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击驱灵祭坛，从完成的驱灵仪式中将怪物储藏进该物品。不能用于地图中被浸血法器开启的驱灵仪式。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click an item with at least two Influenced Modifiers to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击一个至少有两种影响效果词缀的物品来添加。

Description.en: Removes one Influenced Modifier from an item with at least two Influenced Modifiers and upgrades another Influenced Modifier. Upgrading a modifier of the highest tier transforms the modifier into an Elevated Modifier. Attempting to upgrade an Elevated Modifier rerolls its values. Can be used on Body Armours, Boots, Gloves and Helmets.
Description.zh: 从至少有两种影响效果词缀的物品上移除一个影响效果词缀，并升级另外一个影响效果词缀。升级最高阶的词缀会将它转为尊崇词缀。升级尊崇词缀会重置它的数值。可以用于身体装备、脚部装备、手部装备和头部装备。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on an item with at least two Influenced Modifiers to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件至少具有两个影响词缀的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Can be used in a personal Map Device alongside a Map to add the monsters stored from a previous Ritual Altar to a Ritual Altar in that Map.
Directions.zh: 可以在私人地图装置中同地图一起使用，将之前存放于驱灵祭坛中的怪物添加到该地图中的驱灵祭坛。

XBoxDirections.en: Can be used in a personal Map Device alongside a Map to add the monsters stored from a previous Ritual Altar to a Ritual Altar in that Map.
XBoxDirections.zh: 可以在私人地图装置中同地图一起使用，将之前存放于驱灵祭坛中的怪物添加到该地图中的驱灵祭坛。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a flask to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一瓶药剂以使用。

Description.en: Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will improve it but prevent it from gaining charges during its effect. Replaces any existing enchantment.
Description.zh: 给功能药剂增加一个附魔，强化它的效能，但在药剂作用期间无法获得充能。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a flask to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一瓶药剂上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a flask to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一瓶药剂以使用。

Description.en: Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will cause it to be used when certain conditions are met. Replaces any existing enchantment.
Description.zh: 给功能药剂增加一个附魔，在符合条件的情况下自动生效，替换任何现有附魔

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a flask to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一瓶药剂上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: This item is no longer usable.
Directions.zh: 此物品已不可用。

Directions.zh: 此物品已不可用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个已插入的腐化物品进行添加。

Description.en: Unpredictably reforges the colour of sockets on a corrupted item
Description.zh: 重铸腐化物品上一个插槽的颜色，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化且具有插槽的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个已插入的腐化物品进行添加。

Description.en: Unpredictably adds or removes a link to the largest group of linked sockets on a corrupted item
Description.zh: 增加或移除腐化物品上最大一组已连接插槽之间的一个连接，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化且具有插槽的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个已插入的腐化物品进行添加。

Description.en: Unpredictably adds or removes a socket on a corrupted item
Description.zh: 增加或移除腐化物品上的一个插槽

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted socketed item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化且具有插槽的物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted rare item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个腐化物品进行添加。

Description.en: Unpredictably either reforges a corrupted rare item with new random modifiers or removes all of its modifiers
Description.zh: 用新随机属性重铸一个腐化稀有物品，或者移除它的所有词缀，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted rare item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的稀有物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted rare item to apply it. Rare items can have up to six random modifiers.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一个腐化物品来应用。 腐化物品最多可以拥有六个词缀。

Description.en: Unpredictably adds or removes a modifier on a corrupted rare item
Description.zh: 给腐化稀有物品增加或移除一个词缀，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted rare item to apply it. Rare items can have up to six random modifiers.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的稀有物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。稀有物品可以拥有最多六个随机词缀。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted item to apply it. Cannot apply to Maps.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个腐化物品进行添加。不能用于地图。

Description.en: Unpredictably either upgrades a corrupted item to unique rarity or destroys it
Description.zh: 把腐化物品升级为传奇物品，或者将其摧毁，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted item to apply it. Cannot apply to Maps.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的物品上 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。不能用于地图。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted armour to apply it. The maximum random quality is 29%.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一件腐化的身体装备来添加。 随机品质上限为 29% 。

Description.en: Randomises the quality of a corrupted armour
Description.zh: 随机化腐化护甲的品质

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted armour to apply it. The maximum random quality is 29%.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的护甲上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。随机品质上限为 29%。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted weapon to apply it. The maximum random quality is 29%.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击一把腐化武器来添加。 随机品质上限为 29% 。

Description.en: Randomises the quality of a corrupted weapon
Description.zh: 随机化腐化武器的品质

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted weapon to apply it. The maximum random quality is 29%.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的武器上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。随机品质上限为 29%。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a corrupted rare item to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个腐化物品进行添加。

Description.en: Unpredictably raises or lowers the tier of each modifier on a corrupted rare item
Description.zh: 给腐化稀有物品提升或降低一个位阶，不可预料结果

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a corrupted rare item to apply it.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一件已腐化的稀有物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a normal, magic or rare item to apply it. Cannot be used on Shaper, Elder or Elderslayer influenced items.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，再左键点击一个普通、魔法或稀有物品来添加。不能添加给塑界者物品、裂界者物品、裂界屠杀者物品。

Description.en: Adds a Lesser Searing Exarch implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Eater of Worlds implicit modifiers.
Description.zh: 给身体装备、脚部装备、手部装备、头部装备添加一个次级焚界者基底词缀。它会替换除灭界者基底词缀外的所有原有基底词缀。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a normal, magic or rare item to apply it. Cannot be used on Shaper, Elder or Elderslayer influenced items.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，随后在一个普通、魔法或稀有物品上按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以使用。不能对塑界者物品、裂界者物品或裂界屠杀者物品使用。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a non-unique item to apply it. Can only be used on items that have both a Searing Exarch and an Eater of Worlds implicit modifier. The chance of raising or lowering a modifier depends on its relative strength.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，再左键点击非传奇物品使用。只能用于同时有焚界者和灭界者基底词缀的物品。词缀升降几率有它相关的强度决定。

Description.en: Unpredictably raise the strength of one Searing Exarch or Eater of Worlds modifier on an item and lower the strength of another. Lesser modifiers that have their strength lowered will be removed.
Description.zh: 随机提高一件物品上焚界者或灭界者词缀的强度，同时降低另外一个。被降低的那一个词缀会被移除。

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a non-unique item to apply it. Can only be used on items that have both a Searing Exarch and Eater of Worlds implicit modifier. The chance of raising or lowering a modifier depends on its relative strength.

Directions.en: Trade this in to Siosa inside the Library for a Skill Gem
Directions.zh: 可于图书馆的【萨欧赛】处交换技能宝石

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a rare item with The Searing Exarch or The Eater of Worlds dominance to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击该物品，随后左键点击一个首要为焚界者或灭界者的稀有物品进行添加。

Description.en: If The Searing Exarch is dominant, reroll prefix modifiers. If The Eater of Worlds is dominant, reroll suffix modifiers.

Directions.en: Right click this item in your inventory to set it to be active. This item is consumed when triggered. Only one Omen can be triggered from combat in each instance.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品以将其激活。此物品触发效果时会被消耗。每个副本只能在战斗中触发一个预兆。

Description.en: Place into an empty [Augment] Socket in a Bow to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other [Augment] items.

Directions.en: Attach five of this item to the effigy in Caer Tarth to be able to perform the [RitualRiteOfTheNameless|Rite of the Nameless].
Directions.zh: 将 5 个此物品放置在赛尔塔斯的雕像上，即可进行[RitualRiteOfTheNameless|无名仪式]。

Directions.en: Can be combined with the Origin Spark within the Tower of Origins
Directions.zh: 可在起源之塔内与起源火花组合。

Directions.en: Can be combined with the Origin Cradle within the Tower of Origins
Directions.zh: 可在起源之塔内与起源摇篮组合。

Directions.en: Bring to the apex of the Tower of Origins.
Directions.zh: 将其带到起源之塔的顶端。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Strongbox to open it. May only be used once per Strongbox.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，然后左键点击一个保险箱以打开。每个保险箱仅可使用一次。

Description.en: Opens an unopened [Strongbox] allowing it to be opened an additional time
Description.zh: 打开一个未打开的[Strongbox|保险箱]，可额外打开一次

XBoxDirections.en: <<xbox_button_x>> to use, then <<xbox_button_a>> on a Strongbox to open it. May only be used once per Strongbox.
XBoxDirections.zh: 按 <<xbox_button_x>> 使用，然后对保险箱按 <<xbox_button_a>> 以打开。每个保险箱仅可使用一次。

Directions.en: Right click this item then left click a Kalguuran Skill gem to apply it.
Directions.zh: 右键点击此物品，然后左键点击 1 个卡古兰技能宝石以使用。

Description.en: Sets a Kalguuran Skill Gem to level 1
Description.zh: 将 1 个卡古兰技能宝石设置为 1 级
